headline: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
summary: Ford integrates Apple Maps into its new EV platform, launching with a $30k pickup in 2027. This brings natural language directions, real-time traffic, and intuitive search. The system will also enhance BlueCruise driver assist features.

headline: The sci-fi movie that imagines AI isn’t so dystopian after all
summary: A new sci-fi movie explores a hopeful, non-dystopian vision of AI. It follows parents who use AI to bring back their deceased son. The film challenges typical negative AI narratives.

headline: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left
summary: Right-wing Floridians protested a data center, showing common ground with the left. This protest occurred despite a county moratorium on new developments. The group gathered to express concerns over local infrastructure.

headline: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
summary: Google's parent, Alphabet, faces a $1 billion EU fine. This penalty is for favoring its products in search results. Google also blocked Android developers from alternative payment methods.

headline: Okay, So We Now Know 1 Weapon Coming to Helldivers 2 as Part of the Warhammer 40,000 Warbond, and I Think We Can Guess a Few Others
summary: Helldivers 2 announces a Warhammer 40,000 crossover on July 30. One new weapon for the Legendary Warbond is confirmed. Fans are speculating about other potential additions.

headline: Luna Is Now Part of Prime Video at No Extra Cost, Amazon Wants to 'Rebuild Trust' in Cloud Gaming
summary: Amazon's Luna cloud gaming is now free for Prime Video users. This applies to Fire TV in the US and UK. Amazon hopes to rebuild trust in cloud gaming.

headline: Agefield High: Rock the School Is Far From the Bully Successor We Were Hoping For | IGN Preview
summary: IGN's preview trashes "Agefield High: Rock the School". It's deemed unpolished, uninspired, and buggy. The game fails as a "Bully" successor.

headline: Resident Evil Director Zach Cregger Reveals Star Austin Abrams Almost Died Shooting That Zombie Scene From the Trailer
summary: Resident Evil director Zach Cregger revealed a near-fatal incident. Star Austin Abrams almost died shooting a zombie scene. The incident occurred during filming for the upcoming movie.

headline: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
summary: Trump links a Saudi nuclear deal to Israel recognition. Saudi Arabia must join the Abraham Accords for the agreement. This condition aims to promote Middle East peace.

headline: Police failed to check Manchester synagogue attacker's phones despite arresting him twice
summary: Manchester Police apologize for failing to check an attacker's phones. Jihad Al-Shamie was arrested twice before his synagogue attack. This oversight meant potential evidence was missed.

headline: Government to cut business rates for pubs, clubs and music venues
summary: Government to cut business rates for hospitality venues. Pubs, clubs, and music venues get a 20% discount. This is set to save businesses approximately £1,100 each.

headline: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
summary: Gary Lineker and other millionaires ask new PM Andy Burnham to tax them more. They sent a letter stating they "can afford it". This initiative calls for greater wealth redistribution.
